name: C2xGetMessageHandle
title: C2xGetMessageHandle
syntax: long C2xGetMessageHandle(char* stationName, uint64 stationID, long sequenceNumber); //form 4
description: This function returns the packet handle for a specified Car2x message.
Form 3 & 4 only work for stations where one or more DENMs are active.

parameters.name: stationID
parameters.description: Id of the station that sends multiple DENM messages

parameters.name: sequenceNumber
parameters.description: Sequence number of the specified DENM messages

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
